title: A Kinder Gentler Murderer
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'High Priest Syltetzalvek'

requirements.label: Do not use the Dagger of Spectral Disruption.

title: A Little Help From My Friends
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Vulak`Aerr'

requirements.label: Defeat Vulak`Aerr with at least 2 dragon allies still alive.

title: Any Two Forms Will Do
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Velishan's Revenge'

requirements.label: Defeat Velishan when she has only used two forms.

title: Avert Your Gaze
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'The Return of King Xorbb'

requirements.label: Defeat King Xorbb without anyone failing to avert their eyes upon the King's command.

title: Avoiding Explosives
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Danela's Stand'

requirements.label: Do not allow any of your allies to be hit by an exploding barrel.

title: Avoiding the Deep End
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Glimpse, the Unseen'

requirements.label: Do not allow anyone to die while fighting Glimpse with the pools of deathly shadow.

title: Avoiding the Rage
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Champions of the People'

requirements.label: Do not allow anyone to be hit by Kilsev's Rage ability.

title: Boulder Basher
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Danela's Stand'

requirements.label: Ensure that all falling boulders land directly on Danela's head.

title: Can't Touch That
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'The Madness of King Tormax'

requirements.label: Do not allow Yelinak to absorb any crystals.

title: Crowd Pleaser
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Champions of the People'

requirements.label: Ensure the crowd cheers after every command.

title: Crystals Are Not Forever
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Zeixshi-Kar's Shard'

requirements.label: Do not allow any of your allies to be trapped in a fear shard for more than 60 seconds.

title: Curing the Corrupted
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'A Feast for Zalikor'

requirements.label: Do not allow any of your allies to be devoured by Zalikor while corrupted.

title: Fire Fleer
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'A Feast for Zalikor'

requirements.label: Do not allow any of your allies to be hit by a blast of fire.

title: Fire Master
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Heart of the Oak'

requirements.label: Send at least six tainted plants to a flaming end against the molars defending the mouth of Evantil.

title: Flame Resistant
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Guardian of the Gate'

requirements.label: Do not allow anyone to be hit by a fireball.

title: Flying a Kite
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Grelleth, Her Majesty the Queen'

requirements.label: After Grelleth has powered up, do not slay her swinetor or undead reinforcements until she is dead.

title: Fragged
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Glimpse, the Unseen'

requirements.label: Kill at least 5 of Glimpse's doppelgangers (a fragment of shadow.)

title: Fragless
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Glimpse, the Unseen'

requirements.label: Kill Glimpse without killing any of its doppelgangers (a fragment of shadow.)

title: Free Five
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Zeixshi-Kar's Shard'

requirements.label: Free five Coldain and/or Kromrif from Zeixshi-Kar's charm.

title: Friends to the End
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Dispelling the Shadows'

requirements.label: Let the bearers of light and darkness heal Luclin 20 times and live until she reaches 15% HP.

title: Heart of the Fearless
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Memories of the Faceless'

requirements.label: Defeat all the creatures of fear in 15 minutes or less.

title: Impressively Bad
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'High Priest Syltetzalvek'

requirements.label: Defeat High Priest Syltetzalvek after incorrectly identifying the murderer at least five times.

title: It Burns!
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Yymp the Infernal'

requirements.label: Do at least 75,000 points of fire damage to Yymp the Abyssal and feel the burn!

title: Keep Your Corpses Afloat
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'A Matter of Life and Death'

requirements.label: Do not allow any corpses to be dragged into the water.

title: Mirror, Mirror
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'The Return of King Xorbb'

title: Multi-Faceted
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Vulak`Aerr'

title: Never Back Down

requirements.label: Defeat Vulak`Aerr without allowing any Chaos Orbs to explode.

title: Orc Preservation

requirements.label: Do no fire damage at all to Yymp the Abyssal.

description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Dispelling the Shadows'

requirements.label: Reduce Luclin's HP to 35% before activating each door.

description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Grelleth, Her Majesty the Queen'

requirements.label: Send 4 palace guards and at least 6 oashim to their death as charmed pets.

description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'High Priest Syltetzalvek'

requirements.label: Correctly identify the murderer on your first confession or accusation.

description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Yymp the Infernal'

requirements.label: Leave ten additional elementals alive to fight after Oxide Fire dies.

requirements.label: Kill the undying pest hunters at least 15 times.

description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Velishan's Revenge'

description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Heart of the Oak'

description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Champions of the People'

requirements.label: Complete the raid after sparing the frightened slave.

description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'An End to Fear'

requirements.label: Kill at least four empowered creatures of fear.

description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Guardian of the Gate'

requirements.label: Extinguish 'Engulfing Flames' by ducking, sitting, or feigning death.

description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Zeixshi-Kar's Shard'

requirements.label: Kill all of the Coldain and Kromrif, rather than freeing them.

description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'The Madness of King Tormax'

requirements.label: Do not allow any of the cursed whelps to be eaten by Zalikor.

requirements.label: Allow Xaric to consume six essences of fear.

requirements.label: Defeat Velishan after she has used all forms in this order: Magic, Ice, Fire, Disease, Stone.

title: The Ultimate Sacrifice
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'A Matter of Life and Death'

requirements.label: Defeat Marnek after all living sacrifices have died.

title: There Can Be Only One
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'An End to Fear'

requirements.label: Allow exactly one empowered creature of fear to be created.

title: Time of Death
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Guardian of the Gate'

requirements.label: Allow one minute to pass between the death of Findlewill and Mordaur.

title: Unen'thrall'ed
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Memories of the Faceless'

requirements.label: Succeed without charming any pest hunters or thralls.

description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Heart of the Oak'

requirements.label: Do not allow anyone to be trapped in a mantrap for more than 45 seconds.

description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'A Matter of Life and Death'

requirements.label: Defeat Marnek with all living sacrifices still alive.

description: This achievement is gained upon completing all of the Hunter achievements in Rain of Fear. Completing this achievement grants the title 'the Fearslayer'

Adept Hunter of Rain of Fear
Veteran Hunter of Rain of Fear
Expert Hunter of Rain of Fear

title: Novice Hunter of Rain of Fear
description: This achievement is gained upon completing the following Hunter achievements:

title: Veteran Hunter of Rain of Fear
description: This achievement is gained upon completing the following Hunter achievements:

requirements.label: Hunter of Evantil, the Vile Oak

title: 101 Ways to Keep Your Chin Warm (Kael Drakkel)
description: A collection of drawings cataloguing the many styles of facial hair worn by the Coldain and Storm Giants in Kael Drakkel.

title: A City Unraveled (Chelsith Reborn)
description: Complete all of the Collection achievements in Chelsith Reborn.

title: A Faerie Fun Party (Kael Drakkel)
description: The incriminating evidence left behind by the hard-partying faeries of Kael Drakkel who may or may not remember the night before.

title: A Tracker's Guide to Shard's Landing (Shard's Landing)
description: A compendium of tracking information for all the creatures in Shard's Landing, put together by the adventurers who first explored there.

title: Alaran in Chains (Shard's Landing)
description: The tools, implements, and evidence of the brutal slavery taking place in the Underground City at Shard's Landing.

title: At the Heart of It (Heart of Fear)
description: Complete all of the Collection achievements in Heart of Fear.

requirements.label: No Body Left Behind (Heart of Fear)
Kill Them Before They Grow (Heart of Fear)

title: At the Source (Shard's Landing)
description: Investigate the crash site of the largest chunks of the fear shard and the organizations interested in accumulating them.

title: Balance of Shadows (Plane of Shadow)
description: Excerpts from the log of Aten Ha Ra, the uncorrupted priestess of Luclin, as she roams the Plane of Shadow.

title: Before There Was Peace (Plane of Shadow)
description: Light and dark holy relics from the past planes of Light and Darkness, before they merged into the Plane of Shadow.

title: Below the Surface (Chelsith Reborn)
description: Sketchy items found in the aqueduct of Chelsith Reborn that depict the rough lives of its denizens.

title: Blessings of the Icewing (The Breeding Grounds)
description: A catalog of the quotes, poems, and mementos at the Icewing burial grounds

title: Chasing Cazic (Rain of Fear)
description: Complete all of the Collection achievements in Rain of Fear's Tier 1 zones.

title: Chilling with the Giants (Kael Drakkel)
description: Study the curious cultures and violent lifestyles of the factions fighting in Kael Drakkel: The King's Madness.

requirements.label: 101 Ways to Keep Your Chin Warm

title: Cleaning Up Cazic (Rain of Fear)
description: Complete all of the Collection achievements in Rain of Fear's Tier 2 zones.

title: Coldain's Last Stand (The Crystal Caverns)
description: A partial record of the communication between the Coldain of The Crystal Caverns.

title: Corrupted Guardians (Plane of Shadow)
description: Body parts collected from the akhevan corrupted by the fear shards in Plane of Shadow.

title: Corruption Catalogued (The Breeding Grounds)
description: Evidence of the Fearwing dragons' corruption caused by the fear shard in The Breeding Grounds

title: Crystal Takes Many Shapes (Chelsith Reborn)
description: Signs of the varied lifestyles of slaves and shissar trapped in Chelsith Reborn.

title: Crystal Tchotchkes (The Crystal Caverns)
description: Some of the many things the orcs of The Crystal Caverns covet.

title: Dark Secrets (Shadow of Fear)
description: Complete all of the Collection achievements in Shadow of Fear, and find one additional item in Chelsith Reborn and Plane of Shadow.

title: Death is Only the Beginning (Chapterhouse of the Fallen)
description: Fight through the undead, necromancers, and disgraced knights in Chapterhouse of the Fallen to uncover the relics of its denizens and learn more about their origins.

title: Death isn't Easily Undone (Chapterhouse of the Fallen)
description: The tools and refuse of necromancers at work in Chapterhouse of the Fallen

title: Delicious Meats (Grelleth's Palace)
description: There are a hundred ways to cook a pig. The Swinetor of Grelleth's Palace can teach you eight.

title: Dem Bones (Chapterhouse of the Fallen)
description: A small sample of the diverse bones found in Chapterhouse of the Fallen

title: Digging for Dragons (The Breeding Grounds)
description: Delve into The Breeding Grounds and learn all you can about its inhabitants, both alive and passed.

title: Dirty Robotics (Grelleth's Palace)
description: The inner workings of the filthy robots built by Swinetor at Grelleth's Palace.

title: Down to the Last Dwarf (The Crystal Caverns)
description: Learn the plight of the Coldain Dwarves in The Crystal Caverns: Fragment of Fear and the many enemies that threaten their survival.

title: Eye Won! (Valley of King Xorbb)
description: Explore the depravity of King Xorbb and his minions conquering Valley of King Xorbb against halfling resistance.

title: Fear in Pieces (Shard's Landing)
description: Some of the smaller pieces of Cazic-Thule's scattered essence that landed throughout Shard's Landing.

title: Fight for Your Life (Chelsith Reborn)
description: The tools and consequences of violence from the gladiator camps and prisons of Chelsith Reborn.

title: Gelatinous Geometry (Valley of King Xorbb)
description: While cubes remain the most aggressive, gelatin can take many shapes. This is a small sampling taken from the gelatinous cubes in Valley of King Xorbb.

title: Gildorn: Madman or Visionary? (Zeixshi-Kar's Awakening)
description: An unscientific study of the many varied opinions of Gildorn, the rebellious dwarf in Zeixshi-Kar's Awakening.

title: Glimpses of Nightmare (Zeixshi-Kar's Awakening)
description: A collection of knowledge and keepsakes from the creatures of nightmare that have crossed over from the Plane of Fear into Zeixshi-Kar's Awakening.

title: Gnomish Gizmos (Evantil, the Vile Oak)
description: Gadgets and gizmos a-plenty abandoned by an unknown gnomish inventor around Evantil, the Vile Oak.

title: Gross Popsicles (The Crystal Caverns)
description: It takes more than a stick, some ice, and assorted animal body parts to make a delicious treat in The Crystal Caverns.

title: Hairy and Scary (The Crystal Caverns)
description: A collection of the rubbish, webbing, and body parts left behind by the spiders of The Crystal Caverns.

title: Heralds of War (Zeixshi-Kar's Awakening)
description: Hunt the dangerous wildlife of Zeixshi-Kar's Awakening and look into rumors of armies amassing there for war.

title: Hidden Faces (Heart of Fear)
description: The devoted worshipers in Heart of Fear cannot be understood, only observed.

title: Icky, Sticky, and Squishy (Evantil, the Vile Oak)
description: A collection of the gross bugs found in the crooked nooks of Evantil, the Vile Oak.

title: Icy Artifacts (Kael Drakkel)
description: Some of the key equipment needed by the Coldain and Storm Giants to survive in Kael Drakkel.

title: It Attracts All Kinds (Zeixshi-Kar's Awakening)
description: Trophies ripped from the diverse and dangerous beasts attracted to Zeixshi-Kar's Awakening in Velious because of the fear shard that landed there.

title: Kill Them Before They Grow (Heart of Fear)
description: All manner of horrifying creature grows in Heart of Fear, hoping to absorb all of its power.

title: Life-size Fossils (The Breeding Grounds)
description: A collection of things trapped and encased inside lava at The Breeding Grounds

title: Mementos of the Fallen (Valley of King Xorbb)
description: Keepsakes taken off the bodies of fallen Halfling adventurers in Valley of King Xorbb.

title: Minotaur Warfare (Valley of King Xorbb)
description: Weapons, tools, and trophies amassed by the minotaurs in Valley of King Xorbb.

title: Nature is Weird (Evantil, the Vile Oak)
description: Discover the depths of corruption that the fear shard has caused to Evantil, the Vile Oak and all the creatures that call it home.

title: Nature's Corrupted Candy (Evantil, the Vile Oak)
description: The sheddings of Evantil, the Vile Oak, a once noble tree corrupted by a fear shard.

title: No Body Left Behind (Heart of Fear)
description: A catalog of the corporeal scraps left behind by doomed adventurers in Heart of Fear.

title: Nothing Left to Fear (Rain of Fear)
description: Complete all of the Collection achievements in the Rain of Fear expansion. Completing this achievement grants the title 'the Fearchaser'

title: One Pig's Trash (Grelleth's Palace)
description: The swinetor at Grelleth's Palace throw everything in the trash, which means there are always a few salvagable items to be found there.

title: Prime Predators (Kael Drakkel)
description: Trophies that the Storm Giants of Kael Drakkel have ripped from their many enemies near home.

title: Remnants of a Lost Life (Evantil, the Vile Oak)
description: The last signs of the regal lives the Wretched enjoyed before they were destroyed by Evantil's corrupted fruit. From such heights, they've fallen to simple savagery.

title: Resilient Nature (Grelleth's Palace)
description: Rare bits of nature plucked from Grelleth's Palace before the Swinetor could defile them.

title: Secrets of an Entire World (Plane of Shadow)
description: Whispers and secrets spoken in the shadows of Norrath that have made their way to the Plane of Shadow.

title: Signs of Madness (Shard's Landing)
description: Religious artifacts, scrolls, and journals that reveal the developing madness of the Alaran Forsaken in Shard's Landing.

title: Smite Makes Right (Chapterhouse of the Fallen)
description: The blessed weapons, tokens, and confessions of the paladins and priests of Marr in Chapterhouse of the Fallen.

title: Stalking Fear (Rain of Fear)
description: The scattered records of an Alaran worshiper traveling Norrath in search of the falling shards of fear. You must own the Rain of Fear expansion Collector's Edition to collect these items.

requirements.label: Own the Rain of Fear Collector's Edition

title: The Depths of Fear (Rain of Fear)
description: A sampling of the strange things from the deepest dungeons of fear.

requirements.label: Lesser Hero of Rain of Fear
Hero of the Heart of Fear

title: The Magic of Science (Chelsith Reborn)
description: Logs of the scientists working to recreate the deadly green mist in Chelsith Reborn.

title: The Smellier the Better (The Breeding Grounds)
description: A sampling of the cheeses hoarded by the Chetari in The Breeding Grounds

title: The Tilted Balance (Plane of Shadow)
description: Complete all of the Collection achievements in Plane of Shadow.

requirements.label: Before There Was Peace (Plane of Shadow)
Secrets of an Entire World (Plane of Shadow)

title: This Little Piggy (Grelleth's Palace)
description: Make your way through the overwhelming trash at Grelleth's Palace, The Chateau of Filth and salvage whatever you can.

title: Unfinished Business (Chapterhouse of the Fallen)
description: Objects of affection, remorse, or dread linked to the restless souls in Chapterhouse of the Fallen.

title: Unrestrained Science (Valley of King Xorbb)
description: Documentation of the abhorrent experiments into biological crystal growth being conducted on the goblins in Valley of King Xorbb.

title: Weapons of War (Zeixshi-Kar's Awakening)
description: Zeixshi-Kar recruits his army from all the races on Velious, resulting in a wild assortment of weapons in their armory.

title: Whuzzle's Worst Nightmares (Heart of Fear)
description: The fears of a single, traveled gnome brought to manifest in Heart of Fear.
